Package BusinessLayer

Class Circuit

java.lang.Object
BusinessLayer.Circuit
public class Circuit extends Object
Represents a digital circuit with components and connectors. Provides methods for simulation, propagation, and cycle detection.

This class is responsible for managing all components and connectors in a circuit, updating their states, propagating signals, and detecting cycles. It can also reset the circuit to its initial state.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Circuit()
    Default constructor.
    Circuit(String name)
    Constructs a circuit with a given name.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addComponent(Component component)
    Adds a component to the circuit if it doesn't already exist.
    void
    addConnector(Connector connector)
    Adds a connector (wire) to the circuit if it doesn't already exist.
    boolean
    detectCycles()
    Detects whether the circuit contains any cycles.
    String
    getCircuitName()
    Returns the name of the circuit.
    ArrayList<Component>
    getComponents()
    Returns the list of components in the circuit.
    ArrayList<Connector>
    getConnectors()
    Return a list of connectors in the circuit
    void
    propagateFrom(Component source)
    Propagates signals starting from a specific component.
    void
    removeComponent(Component component)
    Removes a component from the circuit.
    void
    removeConnector(Connector connector)
    Removes a connector (wire) from the circuit.
    void
    reset()
    Resets all component and connector values and clears connections.
    void
    setCircuitName(String name)
    Sets the name of the circuit.
    void
    setComponents(ArrayList<Component> components)
    Sets the list of components in the circuit.
    void
    setConnectors(ArrayList<Connector> connectors)
    Sets the list of connectors (wires) in the circuit.
    void
    updateCircuit()
    Updates the entire circuit by propagating values through all components and connectors using a BFS approach.

  • Constructor Details

    • Circuit

      public Circuit()
      Default constructor. Initializes empty component and connector lists.

    • Circuit

      public Circuit(String name)
      Constructs a circuit with a given name.
      Parameters:
      name - Name of the circuit

  • Method Details

    • getComponents

      public ArrayList<Component> getComponents()
      Returns the list of components in the circuit.
      Returns:
      ArrayList of components

    • getConnectors

      public ArrayList<Connector> getConnectors()
      Return a list of connectors in the circuit
      Returns:

    • setComponents

      public void setComponents(ArrayList<Component> components)
      Sets the list of components in the circuit.
      Parameters:
      components - ArrayList of components

    • setConnectors

      public void setConnectors(ArrayList<Connector> connectors)
      Sets the list of connectors (wires) in the circuit.
      Parameters:
      connectors - ArrayList of connectors

    • getCircuitName

      public String getCircuitName()
      Returns the name of the circuit.
      Returns:
      Circuit name

    • setCircuitName

      public void setCircuitName(String name)
      Sets the name of the circuit.
      Parameters:
      name - Circuit name

    • addComponent

      public void addComponent(Component component)
      Adds a component to the circuit if it doesn't already exist.
      Parameters:
      component - Component to add

    • removeComponent

      public void removeComponent(Component component)
      Removes a component from the circuit.
      Parameters:
      component - Component to remove

    • addConnector

      public void addConnector(Connector connector)
      Adds a connector (wire) to the circuit if it doesn't already exist.
      Parameters:
      connector - Connector to add

    • removeConnector

      public void removeConnector(Connector connector)
      Removes a connector (wire) from the circuit.
      Parameters:
      connector - Connector to remove

    • updateCircuit

      public void updateCircuit()
      Updates the entire circuit by propagating values through all components and connectors using a BFS approach.

    • propagateFrom

      public void propagateFrom(Component source)
      Propagates signals starting from a specific component. Useful when toggling a switch.
      Parameters:
      source - Component to start propagation from

    • detectCycles

      public boolean detectCycles()
      Detects whether the circuit contains any cycles.
      Returns:
      true if a cycle exists, false otherwise

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets all component and connector values and clears connections. Useful before reloading or simulating a fresh circuit.
